resultList.dtldesc: Luxurious 3 BHK High-Rise Apartment in Narsingi, Hyderabad::::::::Experience elevated living in this premium 3 BHK apartment located in Narsingi, one of the most sought-after residential corridors of Hyderabad. Public transport, banks, ATMs and other essential services are easily accessible. This apartment is ideal for families and professionals seeking a premium high-rise residence with comprehensive amenities in a rapidly growing and well-connected part of Hyderabad.
